sourcesContent:
/** Content for individual service pages (/services/:slug). */

const processSteps = [
  { title: 'Submit your query', text: 'Tell us what you need through our website enquiry form.' },
  { title: 'Review of your requirements', text: 'We assess your situation and confirm how we can help.' },
  { title: 'Initial consultation', text: 'We gather the information needed to scope the work clearly.' },
  { title: 'Setup and onboarding', text: 'We agree timelines, systems access, and responsibilities.' },
  { title: 'Ongoing delivery and support', text: 'We deliver the service and remain available for questions.' },
];

const services = [
  {
    slug: 'bookkeeping',
    category: 'Accounting Services',
    title: 'Bookkeeping',
    heroDescription:
      'Reliable bookkeeping so your records stay accurate, organised, and ready for tax, reporting, and decisions.',
    introExtra:
      'Whether you use cloud software or spreadsheets, we keep your books tidy so deadlines and decisions feel manageable.',
    problems: [
      'Piles of receipts and invoices with no consistent posting routine',
      'Bank feeds and card transactions that never quite reconcile',
      'Uncertainty about margins, VAT, or year-end adjustments',
      'Admin time spent on data entry instead of serving customers',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Regular posting and categorisation aligned to your chart of accounts',
      'Bank, card, and control account reconciliations you can rely on',
      'Clear handover packs for VAT, payroll, and year-end',
      'Practical guidance on software setup and simple controls',
    ],
    included: [
      'Recording sales, purchases, and expenses',
      'Bank and credit card reconciliations',
      'Month-end or period close routines (as agreed)',
      'Summaries suited to management and compliance handoffs',
    ],
    audience: ['SMEs', 'Sole traders', 'Growing startups', 'Anyone moving off DIY bookkeeping'],
    icon: '\u{1F4CB}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Hero-style scene: office, bookkeeping, or cloud accounting', sizeHint: 'Wide banner · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Supporting visual: reports, ledger, or workflow', sizeHint: 'Landscape · e.g. 1200×675px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'management-accounts',
    category: 'Accounting Services',
    title: 'Management Accounts',
    heroDescription:
      'Regular management accounts that give you a clear view of performance between year-ends.',
    introExtra:
      'We turn your numbers into a concise rhythm of reporting so you can steer cash, profit, and growth month to month.',
    problems: [
      'Decisions made on gut feel because P&L is always "out of date"',
      'Cash in the bank mistaken for sustainable profit',
      'Boards or investors asking for numbers you cannot produce quickly',
      'Seasonal swings that are hard to see without period comparisons',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Monthly or quarterly packs tailored to how you run the business',
      'Profit & loss, balance sheet, and cash movement in plain English',
      'Commentary on trends, risks, and opportunities',
      'KPI tables or dashboards where they add real value',
    ],
    included: [
      'Management accounts on an agreed cycle',
      'Variance and trend commentary (scope agreed upfront)',
      'Coordination with bookkeeping and tax deadlines',
      'Meetings or calls to interpret the numbers when needed',
    ],
    audience: ['Owner-managed companies', 'SMEs with growth plans', 'Businesses seeking funding', 'Franchise or multi-site operators'],
    icon: '\u{1F4CA}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Charts, dashboards, or leadership reviewing numbers', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Detail: KPI cards, forecast, or meeting notes', sizeHint: 'Square or 4:3 · e.g. 900×675px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'year-end-accounts',
    category: 'Accounting Services',
    title: 'Year-End Accounts',
    heroDescription:
      'Year-end statutory accounts prepared with care and filed on time where required.',
    introExtra:
      'We coordinate adjustments, disclosures, and filings so your year-end is compliant and clearly explained.',
    problems: [
      'Year-end journals and adjustments left until the last minute',
      'Uncertainty about FRS 102 / Companies Act presentation',
      'Filings to Companies House and HMRC feeling high-risk',
      'Auditors or lenders requesting schedules you do not have',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Structured year-end file with reconciliations and supporting notes',
      'Statutory accounts prepared to the applicable framework',
      'Companies House submission where applicable',
      'Clear explanations for directors and stakeholders',
    ],
    included: [
      'Preparation of statutory financial statements',
      'Tax computation linkage where we also act on tax',
      'iXBRL tagging where required',
      'Support for follow-up questions from authorities or third parties',
    ],
    audience: ['Limited companies', 'Micro and small entities', 'Groups needing aligned year-ends', 'Businesses new to UK filing rules'],
    icon: '\u{1F4C4}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Annual report, signing, or compliance milestone', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Supporting: filings, binders, or year-end checklist', sizeHint: 'Landscape · e.g. 1200×630px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'corporation-tax',
    category: 'Tax Services',
    title: 'Corporation Tax',
    heroDescription:
      'Corporation tax computations and filings handled efficiently for limited companies.',
    introExtra:
      'We align accounts, capital allowances, and reliefs so your CT return is accurate and filed on time.',
    problems: [
      'Complex adjustments between accounting profit and taxable profit',
      'Capital allowances, losses, and group relief rules hard to navigate',
      'Risk of penalties if CT600 or payments are late',
      'R&D, patent box, or other reliefs left unreviewed',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Robust tax computation tied to filed or draft accounts',
      'CT600 preparation and online submission to HMRC',
      'Review of timing for payments and instalments',
      'Sensible planning conversations within compliance boundaries',
    ],
    included: [
      'Corporation tax computation',
      'CT600 and supporting schedules',
      'Claims and elections where applicable and agreed',
      'Coordination with year-end and management reporting',
    ],
    audience: ['UK resident companies', 'Subsidiaries with UK operations', 'Companies with R&D or capex-heavy years', 'First-time filers post-incorporation'],
    icon: '\u{1F4BC}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Tax planning meeting or corporate context', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Detail: calculation, payment timeline, or HMRC portal', sizeHint: 'Landscape · e.g. 1100×620px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'personal-tax-returns',
    category: 'Tax Services',
    title: 'Personal Tax Returns',
    heroDescription:
      'Self-assessment support for individuals and sole traders—clear, accurate, and on time.',
    introExtra:
      'We capture income, reliefs, and payments on account so your return matches HMRC’s expectations.',
    problems: [
      'Multiple income sources (employment, dividends, property, crypto)',
      'Missing UTR, payments on account, or payment deadlines',
      'Expense claims you are unsure how to document',
      'HMRC nudge letters or compliance checks',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Structured checklist so nothing material is missed',
      'Return preparation and filing before the deadline',
      'Guidance on payments, coding notices, and budgeting',
      'Support if HMRC opens an enquiry (as agreed)',
    ],
    included: [
      'Self-assessment tax return (SA100 suite as required)',
      'Review of income, allowances, and reliefs',
      'Electronic filing where eligible',
      'Summary of tax position and next steps',
    ],
    audience: ['Sole traders', 'Directors with income outside PAYE', 'Landlords', 'High earners with complex affairs'],
    icon: '\u{1F4DD}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Individual taxpayer or family finances context', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Supporting: documents, HMRC letter, or calendar of deadlines', sizeHint: 'Portrait ok · e.g. 800×1000px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'vat-returns',
    category: 'Tax Services',
    title: 'VAT Returns',
    heroDescription:
      'VAT preparation and submissions so you stay compliant without the stress.',
    introExtra:
      'We reconcile outputs and inputs, handle schemes where relevant, and submit MTD returns on schedule.',
    problems: [
      'Partial exemption or reverse-charge transactions causing errors',
      'Cash vs invoice accounting confusion',
      'Retail or margin schemes implemented incorrectly',
      'Digital links and MTD record-keeping gaps',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'VAT return built from reconciled underlying records',
      'Review of rates, exemptions, and EU / NI rules where relevant',
      'MTD-compliant submission through approved software',
      'Advice when registrations, schemes, or supplies change',
    ],
    included: [
      'VAT period review and return preparation',
      'Box-by-box sense-check before submission',
      'Filing within HMRC deadlines',
      'Support for VAT inspections or queries (as agreed)',
    ],
    audience: ['VAT-registered businesses', 'E-commerce and services sellers', 'Property landlords (where applicable)', 'Businesses approaching VAT threshold'],
    icon: '\u{1F4E7}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'VAT / MTD digital workflow', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Detail: invoice, return summary, or compliance calendar', sizeHint: 'Landscape · e.g. 1200×675px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'tax-planning',
    category: 'Tax Services',
    title: 'Tax Planning',
    heroDescription:
      'Forward-looking tax planning for owners and businesses—sensible, compliant, and explained clearly.',
    introExtra:
      'We help you see the timing and structure of tax outcomes before decisions become expensive to unwind.',
    problems: [
      'Major transactions (sale, investment, property) without tax modelling',
      'Remuneration packages that ignore NIC and dividend trade-offs',
      'Inheritance and succession questions left too late',
      'Reliefs (EIS, BADR, R&D) not considered early enough',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Scenario planning with clear assumptions and risks flagged',
      'Coordination with legal and wealth advisers where needed',
      'Alignment with accounts, payroll, and filings',
      'Plain-English write-ups directors can rely on',
    ],
    included: [
      'Planning memo or models (scope agreed)',
      'Review of relevant reliefs and timing',
      'Follow-up after key events or Budget changes',
      'Ethical, HMRC-compliant recommendations only',
    ],
    audience: ['Business owners', 'Families with property or investments', 'Companies contemplating exits', 'High-growth SMEs'],
    icon: '\u{1F3AF}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Strategy session or planning workshop', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Detail: timeline, scenarios, or whiteboard sketch', sizeHint: 'Square · e.g. 900×900px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'company-formation',
    category: 'Business Services',
    title: 'Company Formation',
    heroDescription:
      'Get your limited company set up correctly from day one with straightforward guidance.',
    introExtra:
      'We help you choose name, structure, and first filings so you start with clean Companies House records.',
    problems: [
      'Unsure whether a limited company is the right vehicle',
      'Share classes, PSC registers, and articles feel overwhelming',
      'First confirmation statement and accounts deadlines unclear',
      'Bank and HMRC registration steps out of sequence',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Incorporation pathway explained in plain English',
      'Support with share capital, officers, and statutory registers',
      'Checklist for HMRC taxes, PAYE, and VAT registration',
      'Handover to bookkeeping and ongoing compliance',
    ],
    included: [
      'Formation guidance and Companies House filings (as agreed)',
      'PSC and statutory book setup advice',
      'Outline of ongoing filing calendar',
      'Introduction to related Greyline services',
    ],
    audience: ['First-time founders', 'Sole traders incorporating', 'Contractors and consultants', 'Small partnerships converting'],
    icon: '\u{1F3E2}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'New company launch, handshake, or Companies House context', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Supporting: certificate, stationery, or startup desk', sizeHint: 'Landscape · e.g. 1200×630px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'payroll',
    category: 'Business Services',
    title: 'Payroll',
    heroDescription:
      'Payroll processing and RTI submissions so your team is paid accurately and on time.',
    introExtra:
      'We handle pay runs, deductions, and filings so HMRC and your employees see consistent, correct information.',
    problems: [
      'PAYE coding notices and student loans changing mid-year',
      'Auto-enrolment duties and pension uploads',
      'Sick pay, parental leave, and irregular hours',
      'Year-end P60 / P11D pressures',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Scheduled payroll runs with approval checkpoints',
      'RTI FPS and EPS submissions on time',
      'Pension and AE compliance within agreed processes',
      'Clear payroll journals for your accounts',
    ],
    included: [
      'Payroll calculation and payslips',
      'RTI submissions to HMRC',
      'Starter / leaver processing',
      'Year-end returns where in scope (e.g. P60, P11D as agreed)',
    ],
    audience: ['Employers from 1 to 200+ staff', 'Growing SMEs adding headcount', 'Directors on payroll', 'Businesses with variable hours'],
    icon: '\u{1F465}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Team payroll, payslips, or HR context', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Detail: calendar, benefits, or pension communication', sizeHint: 'Landscape · e.g. 1200×675px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'registered-address',
    category: 'Business Services',
    title: 'Registered Address',
    heroDescription:
      'A professional registered office address and mail handling where offered as part of our services.',
    introExtra:
      'Present a credible address to Companies House and clients while keeping post organised under agreed terms.',
    problems: [
      'Home address on public record causing privacy issues',
      'Missed statutory post leading to filing defaults',
      'Clients expecting a business-grade address',
      'Frequent moves making registered details unreliable',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Registered office address service where available',
      'Mail receipt and forwarding per agreed schedule',
      'Reminders tied to confirmation statement and filing cycles',
      'Clear commercial terms and renewal dates',
    ],
    included: [
      'Use of address for registered office (where contracted)',
      'Mail handling process documented',
      'Forwarding options (digital or physical as agreed)',
      'Renewal and compliance expectations in writing',
    ],
    audience: ['New limited companies', 'Remote-first businesses', 'Overseas owners with UK companies', 'Anyone separating home from registered office'],
    icon: '\u{2709}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Business address, mailbox, or professional frontage', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Supporting: mail sorting, scanning, or delivery', sizeHint: 'Landscape · e.g. 1200×630px' },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug: 'business-advisory',
    category: 'Advisory',
    title: 'Business Advisory',
    heroDescription:
      'Practical advice on finances, structure, and next steps—without the jargon.',
    introExtra:
      'We connect your numbers to decisions: funding, cost control, pricing, and sustainable growth.',
    problems: [
      'Growth stalling because margins and cash are unclear',
      'Funding conversations without credible forecasts',
      'Operational bottlenecks showing up late in the P&L',
      'Board or investor expectations not translated into metrics',
    ],
    solutions: [
      'Structured reviews of performance, risks, and opportunities',
      'Scenario and cash-flow thinking grounded in your data',
      'Action plans with owners and management teams',
      'Follow-through against agreed milestones',
    ],
    included: [
      'Advisory sessions on an agreed cadence',
      'Materials and summaries after each meeting',
      'Coordination with tax, payroll, and accounts teams',
      'Ethical guidance aligned to regulatory boundaries',
    ],
    audience: ['Scaling SMEs', 'Family businesses', 'Founders preparing for investment', 'Turnaround and restructuring contexts'],
    icon: '\u{1F4A1}',
    imageSlots: [
      { label: 'Advisory workshop, whiteboard, or leadership meeting', sizeHint: 'Wide · e.g. 1400×600px' },
      { label: 'Detail: roadmap, one-page plan, or growth sketch', sizeHint: 'Square · e.g. 900×900px' },
    ],
  },
];

export const SERVICE_SLUGS = services.map((s) => s.slug);

export const servicesNavGroups = [
  {
    label: 'Accounting Services',
    items: [
      { slug: 'bookkeeping', title: 'Bookkeeping' },
      { slug: 'management-accounts', title: 'Management Accounts' },
      { slug: 'year-end-accounts', title: 'Year-End Accounts' },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Tax Services',
    items: [
      { slug: 'corporation-tax', title: 'Corporation Tax' },
      { slug: 'personal-tax-returns', title: 'Personal Tax Returns' },
      { slug: 'vat-returns', title: 'VAT Returns' },
      { slug: 'tax-planning', title: 'Tax Planning' },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Business Services',
    items: [
      { slug: 'company-formation', title: 'Company Formation' },
      { slug: 'payroll', title: 'Payroll' },
      { slug: 'registered-address', title: 'Registered Address' },
    ],
  },
  {
    label: 'Advisory',
    items: [{ slug: 'business-advisory', title: 'Business Advisory' }],
  },
];

export function getServiceBySlug(slug) {
  return services.find((s) => s.slug === slug) || null;
}

export function getAllServices() {
  return services;
}

export { processSteps };
